title: raw_77_nanobot_bayesian_audit_v2 — F-NB-2 sub-clause witness schema
description: Extends raw_77_nanobot_bayesian_audit_v1 (cycle-25 honest-negative log_bf=0.16 baseline) with three F-NB-2 sub-clause axes: n6-decorative ablation, ensemble corpus-enlargement drift, corpus-source bias. Lands draft from .roadmap.nanobot §Falsifier preregister → n6 invariant binding (F-NB-2). Cycle 27+ deferred fields are marked optional and may be left null until the corpus-enlargement run lands.

cycle.description: Audit cycle number; cycle 25 = baseline (v1), cycle 27+ = first v2 emission.

baseline_v1_witness_ref.description: Pointer back to the v1 baseline witness for diff comparison.

F_NB_2_n6_decorative.description: Ablation: rerun audit after stripping n6 invariants (sigma_6, tau_6, phi_6, J2) from the corpus axis-match scoring. If posterior is unchanged, n6 is decorative annotation; if posterior moves materially, n6 is load-bearing.

axis_statement.const: n6-strip-ablation: |log10_BF(with-n6) - log10_BF(without-n6)| measured on identical corpus.

delta_log10_bf_threshold.description: PASS gate: |delta_log10_bf| >= 0.5 (n6 contributes >= half-decade of evidence). FAIL: < 0.5 means n6 is decorative.

delta_log10_bf_observed.description: Observed |log10_BF_with - log10_BF_without|; null until cycle-27 ablation run.

F_NB_2_b.description: Ensemble drift over corpus enlargement: track log10_BF as n grows from 30 (cycle 25) -> 60 (cycle 27) -> 90 (cycle 28+). PASS = monotone trend toward decisive (log_bf >= 3) by n=60.

axis_statement.const: log10_BF(n) trajectory: trend toward decisive (>=3) as corpus grows from 30 to 60+.

log10_bf_trend_target.description: PASS gate: log10_BF(n=60) >= 3.0 (Jeffreys decisive). FAIL: stays <= 1.0 (no trend).

trajectory.description: Ordered list of (n, log10_bf, posterior_h1) tuples across cycles.

F_NB_2_c.description: Corpus-source bias: split corpus by source class (textbook nano-machines vs experimental papers) and compare per-stratum log10_BF. PASS = posterior robust across strata; FAIL = posterior depends on corpus selection.

axis_statement.const: Stratum bias: |log10_BF(textbook) - log10_BF(experimental)| <= 1.0 (within one Jeffreys band).
